# Darkstone Periapt

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Event |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Darkstone Periapt is an Event Relic from the Trash Heap. It raises Max HP by 6 when a Curse is obtained.

## Notes

### Sources

Can only be obtained randomly from Trash Heap by selecting the  option.

## Update History

- **Early Access v0.98**
    - Added Darkstone Periapt to the game.
